children.heading: Map
children.label: 1 Map
children.text: The term “map” means the map entitled “Oregon Caves National Monument and Preserve”, numbered 150/80,023, and dated May 2010.

children.heading: Monument
children.label: 2 Monument
children.text: The term “Monument” means the Oregon Caves National Monument established by Presidential Proclamation Number 876 (), dated .36 Stat. 2497July 12, 1909

children.heading: National Monument and Preserve
children.label: 3 National Monument and Preserve
children.text: The term “National Monument and Preserve” means the Oregon Caves National Monument and Preserve designated by subsection (b)(1)(A).

children.heading: National Preserve
children.label: 4 National Preserve
children.text: The term “National Preserve” means the National Preserve designated by subsection (b)(1)(B).

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary of Agriculture (acting through the Chief of the Forest Service), with respect to National Forest System land; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary of the Interior, with respect to land managed by the Bureau of Land Management.

children.heading: State
children.label: 7 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Oregon.

children.heading: Designations; land transfer; boundary adjustment
children.label: b Designations; land transfer; boundary adjustment

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Monument and the National Preserve shall be administered as a single unit of the National Park System and collectively known and designated as the “Oregon Caves National Monument and Preserve”.

children.heading: National Preserve
children.label: B National Preserve
children.text: The approximately 4,070 acres of land identified on the map as “Proposed Addition Lands” shall be designated as a National Preserve.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Administrative jurisdiction over the land designated as a National Preserve under paragraph (1)(B) is transferred from the Secretary of Agriculture to the Secretary, to be administered as part of the National Monument and Preserve.

children.heading: Exclusion of land
children.label: B Exclusion of land
children.text: The boundaries of the Rogue River-Siskiyou National Forest are adjusted to exclude the land transferred under subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: located in the City of Cave Junction; and

children.label: B
children.text: identified on the map as the “Cave Junction Unit”.

children.heading: Availability of map
children.label: 4 Availability of map
children.text: The map shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the National Park Service.

children.heading: References
children.label: 5 References
children.text: Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Monument shall be considered to be a reference to the “Oregon Caves National Monument and Preserve”.

children.label: A
children.text: this section;

children.label: B
children.text: Presidential Proclamation Number 876 (), dated ; and36 Stat. 2497July 12, 1909

children.label: C
children.text: any law (including regulations) generally applicable to units of the National Park System, including the National Park Service Organic Act ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 11See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: revise the fire management plan for the Monument to include the land transferred under subsection (b)(2)(A); and

children.label: B
children.text: in accordance with the revised plan, carry out hazardous fuel management activities within the boundaries of the National Monument and Preserve.

children.label: i
children.text: allow for the completion of any Forest Service stewardship or service contract executed as of , with respect to the National Preserve; andDecember 19, 2014

children.label: ii
children.text: recognize the authority of the Secretary of Agriculture for the purpose of administering a contract described in clause (i) through the completion of the contract.

children.heading: Terms and conditions
children.label: B Terms and conditions
children.text: All terms and conditions of a contract described in subparagraph (A)(i) shall remain in place for the duration of the contract.

children.heading: Liability
children.label: C Liability
children.text: The Forest Service shall be responsible for any liabilities relating to a contract described in subparagraph (A)(i).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), the Secretary may allow the grazing of livestock within the National Preserve to continue as authorized under permits or leases in existence as of .December 19, 2014

children.label: i
children.text: at a level not greater than the level at which the grazing exists as of , as measured in Animal Unit Months; andDecember 19, 2014

children.label: ii
children.text: in accordance with each applicable law (including National Park Service regulations).

children.heading: Fish and wildlife
children.label: 5 Fish and wildlife
children.text: The Secretary shall permit hunting and fishing on land and waters within the National Preserve in accordance with applicable Federal and State laws, except that the Secretary may, in consultation with the Oregon Department of Fish and Wildlife, designate zones in which, and establish periods during which, no hunting or fishing shall be permitted for reasons of public safety, administration, or compliance by the Secretary with any applicable law (including regulations).

children.heading: Voluntary grazing lease or permit donation program
children.label: d Voluntary grazing lease or permit donation program
i
children.text: the Big Grayback Grazing Allotment located in the Rogue River-Siskiyou National Forest; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Billy Mountain Grazing Allotment located on a parcel of land that is managed by the Secretary (acting through the Director of the Bureau of Land Management).

children.label: i
children.text: terminate the grazing permit or lease; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ensure a permanent end to grazing on the land covered by the grazing permit or lease.

children.heading: Effect of donation
children.label: 2 Effect of donation
children.text: A lessee or permittee that donates a grazing lease or grazing permit (or a portion of a grazing lease or grazing permit) under this section shall be considered to have waived any claim to any range improvement on the associated grazing allotment or portion of the associated grazing allotment, as applicable.
